input_text: Mary called the boy in the kitchen. Eve reported that Tom arrived. The rain continued. A chocolate cake fell. Mike is a bird. The cat sat on the mat and purred. No penguin can fly. Riga is not in Estonia. Mark is not in the box. Emajogi is 20 meters long. The letter was written. Americans cannot disappear. The big mouse is strong. Dole was defeated by Clinton. The road leading to the village was narrow. Sue is a true patriot. Some elephants are animals. John is a bear. A flower was white. Bike's length is 10 kilometers. Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. Unexpectedly, the door opened. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. The teacher showed the map to the students. The tree was cut by the farmer. Agatha is in trouble. The man carrying a bag waved. Gertrude is a wolf. The city was destroyed. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Daniel journeyed to the office. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. Some elephants are not animals?
